mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refresh_sessions ( user_id, refresh_token_hash, rotated_from_session_id, user_agent, ip_address, expires_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{refreshTokenHash}, #{rotatedFromSessionId}, #{userAgent}, #{ipAddress}, #{expiresAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT refresh_session_id, user_id, refresh_token_hash, rotated_from_session_id, user_agent, ip_address, expires_at, revoked_at, created_at, updated_at FROM refresh_sessions WHERE refresh_token_hash = #{refreshTokenHash}

SELECT refresh_session_id, user_id, refresh_token_hash, rotated_from_session_id, user_agent, ip_address, expires_at, revoked_at, created_at, updated_at FROM refresh_sessions WHERE refresh_token_hash = #{refreshTokenHash} AND revoked_at IS NULL AND expires_at > #{now}
mapper.update: UPDATE refresh_sessions SET revoked_at = COALESCE(revoked_at, #{revokedAt}), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE refresh_session_id = #{refreshSessionId}
UPDATE refresh_sessions SET revoked_at = COALESCE(revoked_at, #{revokedAt}), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE refresh_token_hash = #{refreshTokenHash}

WITH RECURSIVE session_family AS ( SELECT refresh_session_id FROM refresh_sessions WHERE refresh_session_id = #{refreshSessionId} UNION ALL SELECT child.refresh_session_id FROM refresh_sessions child INNER JOIN session_family parent ON child.rotated_from_session_id = parent.refresh_session_id ) UPDATE refresh_sessions SET revoked_at = COALESCE(revoked_at, #{revokedAt}), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE refresh_session_id IN ( SELECT refresh_session_id FROM session_family )
